fields.acceptance_criteria: WgpuOverlay component ported to Dioxus with wgpu; DOM element scanning for glass effects; particle system (sparks, embers, beams, glitter); CRT/vignette post-processing; effect settings signals; theme palette buffer; register/unregister overlay renderer callbacks
fields.title: Feature: WgpuOverlay effects system port — particles, CRT, vignette

fields.acceptance_criteria: WgpuOverlay is the core full-screen GPU compositor layer: DOM element scanning captures visible HTML/CSS layout to GPU element buffers; WebGPU canvas rendered as full-screen background behind interactive HTML elements; glass/blur effects on captured element regions; particle system (sparks, embers, beams, glitter) as compositor layers; CRT/vignette post-processing; effect settings persisted per-theme to localStorage; reference implementation is log-viewer — study its DOM-to-GPU pipeline; component must work as background compositor even without particle effects enabled
fields.title: Feature: WgpuOverlay — full-screen GPU compositor with DOM capture and particle effects
